message:
Remove dead code in ptScan/spScan, fix JSON5 signed NaN, fix TS declarations

- Remove unreachable ptAccumulatingKey checks inside ptInStringValue blocks
  (lines 1482, 1549) — these flags are mutually exclusive
- Eliminate 'both' UTF-8 context variant from ptScan and spScan since
  delta/ld and key accumulators never run simultaneously
- Fix JSON5 -NaN and +NaN: Zig preprocessor now consumes the sign character
  so output is "null" instead of invalid "-null"/"+null"; JS parseJson5Scalar
  also recognizes signed NaN variants
- Fix TS declaration error: cast WebAssembly.instantiate result properly
